author: Anselmo Pinheiro
description: Assistant for semantic search, organisation and enrichment of Markdown notes. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Anselmo Pinheiro
manifest.description: AI-powered note assistant for semantic search, note organisation, smart connections, tags, folders and assisted knowledge workflows.
manifest.name: Lina

name: Lina

releases.author: anselmopinheiro
releases.description:
Release description

This is the initial public release of Lina, an AI-powered Obsidian plugin designed to enhance note-taking, knowledge management, and personal productivity through intelligent assistance.

Lina brings semantic search, smart organisation, and connected thinking directly into your Obsidian workflow, helping you move from isolated notes to a structured and meaningful knowledge system.

Key features
Semantic search across your notes for natural, intent-based discovery
Smart organisation tools to help structure and maintain your knowledge base
Linked notes and relationship mapping to connect ideas automatically
AI-assisted workflows for writing, summarising, and exploring your notes
Lightweight and fast integration with Obsidian
Vision

Lina is built as a personal knowledge assistant that grows with your notes. The goal is to reduce friction in managing information and to help users think more clearly through connected knowledge.

Status

This is an early release (alpha). Features are actively evolving and improvements are ongoing.

Feedback, suggestions, and contributions are welcome.
